Class Zombie

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.MovingEntity
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Zombie
public class Zombie extends MovingEntity
Represents an enemy entity (Zombie) that follows the player using pathfinding and inflicts damage upon collision after a cooldown period.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class MovingEntity

    sprite, x, y

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Zombie(GamePanel a, Position startPos)
    Constructs a Zombie object.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    avoidOverlap(List<Zombie> zombies)
    Applies a small repulsive force to prevent this zombie from overlapping excessively with other zombies on the map.
    void
    draw(Graphics2D g2)
    Draws the zombie sprite on the game screen based on its current position and animation frame.
    Direction
    getDirection()
    Gets the current direction the zombie is moving or facing.
    Rectangle
    getSolidArea()
    Gets the collision detection area for the zombie, relative to its position.
    double
    getSpeed()
    Gets the movement speed of the zombie.
    double
    getXPos()
    Gets the zombie's current X-coordinate (horizontal position in pixels).
    double
    getYPos()
    Gets the zombie's current Y-coordinate (vertical position in pixels).
    void
    getZombieImage()
    Loads the animation sprite images for the zombie from resources.
    void
    setDirection(Direction directionn)
    Sets the direction the zombie is moving or facing.
    void
    setSpeed(double speed)
    Sets the movement speed of the zombie.
    void
    setXPos(double xpos)
    Sets the zombie's current X-coordinate (horizontal position in pixels).
    void
    setYPos(double ypos)
    Sets the zombie's current Y-coordinate (vertical position in pixels).
    void
    update()
    Updates the zombie's state, including path recalculation, movement, animation, and collision detection with the player.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Zombie

      public Zombie(GamePanel a, Position startPos)
      Constructs a Zombie object. Initializes its position, speed (default 1.0), collision area, and loads images.
      Parameters:
      a - The GamePanel instance.
      startPos - The initial position of the zombie (pixel coordinates).

  • Method Details

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(double speed)
      Sets the movement speed of the zombie.
      Parameters:
      speed - The new speed value (double).

    • getXPos

      public double getXPos()
      Gets the zombie's current X-coordinate (horizontal position in pixels).
      Returns:
      The X-coordinate.

    • getYPos

      public double getYPos()
      Gets the zombie's current Y-coordinate (vertical position in pixels).
      Returns:
      The Y-coordinate.

    • setXPos

      public void setXPos(double xpos)
      Sets the zombie's current X-coordinate (horizontal position in pixels).
      Parameters:
      xpos - The new X-coordinate.

    • setYPos

      public void setYPos(double ypos)
      Sets the zombie's current Y-coordinate (vertical position in pixels).
      Parameters:
      ypos - The new Y-coordinate.

    • getSpeed

      public double getSpeed()
      Gets the movement speed of the zombie.
      Returns:
      The current speed value.

    • getSolidArea

      public Rectangle getSolidArea()
      Gets the collision detection area for the zombie, relative to its position.
      Returns:
      The Rectangle representing the solid area.

    • getDirection

      public Direction getDirection()
      Gets the current direction the zombie is moving or facing.
      Returns:
      The current Direction enum value.

    • setDirection

      public void setDirection(Direction directionn)
      Sets the direction the zombie is moving or facing.
      Parameters:
      directionn - The new Direction enum value.

    • update

      public void update()
      Updates the zombie's state, including path recalculation, movement, animation, and collision detection with the player.

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics2D g2)
      Draws the zombie sprite on the game screen based on its current position and animation frame.
      Parameters:
      g2 - The Graphics2D context used for drawing.

    • getZombieImage

      public void getZombieImage()
      Loads the animation sprite images for the zombie from resources.

    • avoidOverlap

      public void avoidOverlap(List<Zombie> zombies)
      Applies a small repulsive force to prevent this zombie from overlapping excessively with other zombies on the map.
      Parameters:
      zombies - A list of all active Zombie entities (List of Zombie).
